author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(index): only set listeners on init once (#4634)
body:
* fix(index): only set listeners on init once

Without this, if init is called multiple times, multiple event listeners are attached, as well as the helper beign recreated.

This fixes https://github.com/algolia/vue-instantsearch/issues/911 by avoiding to have a different helper instance when init gets called multiple times

* test: add tests for this behaviour
